title: README: FAQ + Files → docs/
goal: Move the FAQ and Files-in-the-project sections out of README into new docs/faq.md and docs/files.md (linked from docs/README.md), keeping only 3-4 new-user FAQ entries inline; drop the version-bump/undo/state-layout internals from README.

steps.title: Create docs/files.md
steps.detail: Move the full 'Files in the project' section (tree + state.json/phases/memory/graph prose) verbatim into a new docs/files.md with a short intro; nothing of it stays in README.

steps.title: Create docs/faq.md
steps.detail: New docs/faq.md holding the complete FAQ (all current entries, incl. version-bump/undo/memory internals).

steps.title: Trim README FAQ to new-user concerns
steps.detail: Keep only 3-4 entries inline (pause & resume, API key vs Pro/Max, why permission prompts, commit/push), end with a link to docs/faq.md; drop version-bump/undo/memory internals from README.

steps.title: Drop 'Files in the project' from README
steps.detail: Remove the section; add a one-line pointer to docs/files.md near the .mini/ mention.

steps.title: Link new pages from docs index
steps.detail: Add a 'Concepts & guides' section to docs/README.md linking files.md and faq.md.

steps.title: Verify links and length
steps.detail: Check all relative links resolve and run wc -l README.md to confirm the drop; run typecheck/tests if anything non-doc changed.

resolvedVerify: Read the trimmed README FAQ — are the 4 kept questions the right ones?
